mapper.sql: id, author_id, current_version_id, category_code, review_status, publish_status, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

r.id, r.author_id, u.nickname as author_nickname, v.id as version_id, v.version_no, v.title, v.cover_media_id, v.intro, r.category_code, v.difficulty, v.cook_time, v.serving, r.review_status, r.publish_status, v.status as version_status, v.reject_reason, r.like_count, r.favorite_count, r.comment_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at
mapper.select: select from cook_recipes where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
select from cook_recipes where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null for update

select from cook_recipes r inner join cook_recipe_versions v on v.recipe_id = r.id and v.deleted_at is null inner join cook_users u on u.id = r.author_id and u.deleted_at is null where r.deleted_at is null
and v.status = #{status}
and (v.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by v.updated_at desc, v.id desc
select r.category_code as categoryCode, count(*) as recipeCount from cook_recipes r where r.deleted_at is null and r.category_code is not null and r.category_code != '' group by r.category_code
mapper.insert: insert into cook_recipes (author_id, category_code, review_status, publish_status) values (#{authorId}, #{categoryCode}, #{reviewStatus}, #{publishStatus})
mapper.update: update cook_recipes set category_code = #{categoryCode}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_recipes set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_recipes set current_version_id = #{currentVersionId}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_recipes set publish_status = #{publishStatus}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_recipes set deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_recipes
like_count = like_count + 1, favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, comment_count = comment_count + 1,
updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_recipes
like_count = greatest(like_count - 1, 0), favorite_count = greatest(favorite_count - 1, 0), comment_count = greatest(comment_count - 1, 0),
updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
